notes: PARTIAL — Qwen3.5-27B re-eval with patch 008 (hybrid serial decode). Patch 008 fixed the BATCHED-DECODE CRASH (Coder-30B/Devstral comparable concurrent test now succeeds), but the underlying 4-bit DeltaNet quality regression is unchanged: MMLU 5/30 = 16.7% even on serial path with --no-thinking. HE eval was killed at ~prompt 4 (each Qwen3.5 prompt takes 5+ min serially). So patch 008 fixes correctness but the model is genuinely low-quality. See memory project_qwen35_*.
